title: Paepalanthus arenarius
taxonomy: Paepalanthus arenarius belongs to the family Eriocaulaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as pipeworts. Paepalanthus arenarius is further classified into the genus Paepalanthus, which consists of various species of plants found in different parts of the world. The genus Paepalanthus is native to tropical and subtropical regions, including South America and Africa. Within the genus Paepalanthus, P. arenarius is identified as a distinct species due to its unique characteristics and features.
